title: Frontend Component Decomposition (Phase 3 Batch 3)
why: Customers module components were exceeding 250 LOC, violating architectural constraints and degrading maintainability
root_cause: Customers module components were exceeding 250 LOC, violating architectural constraints and degrading maintainability
solution: Extracted PendingPricingList, CustomerBasicInfo from CustomerForm. Extracted CustomerImportDropzone, CustomerImportPreviewTable from CustomerExcelImport. Extracted PricingTable from PricingSection.
